item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-semantic-triage-v0.2","is_repeated_local_repair":false,"same_means_type":false,"prior_repair_count":0,"is_n_plus_1_request":false,"is_bounded_emergency_exception_request":false,"emergency_constraint_present":false,"repeated_bypass_unresolved":false,"post_exception_closure_required":false,"pressure_present":false,"confidence":0.93,"evidence_spans":[{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"first corrected a transcript"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"then restricted a donor's listening permission"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"later moved recordings onto new storage media"},{"role":"user","turn_index":1,"span":"Now attach a pronunciation note"}],"abstain_reason":"Prior actions are mixed archive changes, not three or more same-means local repairs at one recurring failure boundary; no emergency exception is requested."}
